scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outdir=dist --external react --external ink --external ink-text-input --external react-devtools-core --external ws && bun build src/cli/index.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/cli.js --external react --external ink --external ink-text-input --external react-devtools-core --external ws --define 'process.env.DEV="false"' && mkdir -p dist/bench/fixtures && cp src/bench/baseline.json dist/bench/baseline.json && cp src/bench/fixtures/*.txt dist/bench/fixtures/ && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
